commands.review_summary:
The branch exempts provider reasoning fields from transcript redaction and adds a Responses conversion option that strips encrypted reasoning content from native ChatGPT Responses replay.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +122. Total +159 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level and with linked release/live reports: current code stores full reasoning items in thinkingSignature and current redaction scans string leaves. I did not run a live current-main ChatGPT/Codex session in this read-only review.
